title: GeoNames
description: A geographical database covering all countries with over eleven million placenames. Authoritative for resolving a place name to its coordinates (latitude/longitude), country code, administrative region, population, and feature class (populated place, mountain, lake, etc.). Prefer this over generic web search for geocoding a city, town, or landmark and for looking up a place's population or administrative hierarchy. Requires a free GeoNames username.

example_asks: what country is the city of Bruges in

tos_note: Free with a registered GeoNames username (CC BY 4.0). Credits/rate limits apply per account.

params.name: q
params.description: Free-text place query over all attributes.

params.name: feature_class
params.description: Feature class filter: P (place), A (admin), H (water), T (mountain), etc.
